name: Endothelial Dysfunction in Patients With Erectile Dysfunction: A Double-Blind, Randomized-Control Trial Using Tadalafil.
summary: Double-blind randomized placebo-controlled trial in men with erectile dysfunction and endothelial dysfunction, measuring IIEF-5 and brachial artery flow-mediated dilation after 4 weeks of low-dose tadalafil or placebo.

access_attempts.result: PubMed abstract and metadata accessed via NCBI E-utilities; PMC full text identified.
